heading: Reports on convention financing

children.text: represents a State, or a political subdivision thereof, or any group of persons, in dealing with officials of a national political party with respect to matters involving a convention held in such State or political subdivision to nominate a candidate for the office of President or Vice President, or
represents a national political party in making arrangements for the convention of such party held to nominate a candidate for the office of President or Vice President,
